prompt: Create a vertical cinematic ultra-realistic rainy street portrait of a young woman with long wet dark brown hair crouching low on a reflective wet alley pavement, shot from an extreme low wide-angle perspective so one chunky purple-and-lavender sneaker dominates the foreground and the other shoe is behind her. She wears an oversized distressed blue zip hoodie with torn shoulder and sleeve holes, black socks, and bulky futuristic headphones topped with two glowing blue-black cat-ear attachments. Her face is intentionally hidden by a soft square blur censor centered over the face. She holds one transparent umbrella with visible black ribs and a white handle, covered in raindrops, while one small fluffy cream and gray kitten peeks out from the open hoodie at her chest. The scene contains exactly one woman, one kitten, one umbrella, one pair of headphones with two cat ears, and one pair of purple sneakers. Heavy rain falls through a moody urban alley with tall blurred buildings, puddle reflections, scattered pale pink cherry blossom petals on the ground, and large out-of-focus floating water droplets near the lens. Use a cool blue-purple color grade, glossy wet skin and fabric textures, shallow depth of field, dramatic bokeh, high detail, emotional rainy atmosphere, fashion editorial realism, 9:16 composition, no text.
